mapper.sql: id, coupon_name, coupon_type, discount_value, min_amount, total_count, received_count, used_count, per_limit, start_time, end_time, valid_days, status, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM coupon WHERE 1=1 AND coupon_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM coupon ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (coupon_name, coupon_type, discount_value, min_amount, total_count, received_count, used_count, per_limit, start_time, end_time, valid_days, status, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{couponName}, #{couponType}, #{discountValue}, #{minAmount}, #{totalCount}, #{receivedCount}, #{usedCount}, #{perLimit}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{validDays}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET coupon_name=#{couponName}, coupon_type=#{couponType}, discount_value=#{discountValue}, min_amount=#{minAmount}, total_count=#{totalCount}, per_limit=#{perLimit}, start_time=#{startTime}, end_time=#{endTime}, valid_days=#{validDays}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM coupon WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE coupon SET received_count = received_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE coupon SET used_count = used_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM coupon WHERE status = 1 AND NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time AND received_count < total_count ORDER BY create_time DESC
